UserPromptSubmit.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$logPath = ''C:\Users\Home\Projects\API-tester\.github\hooks\copilot_chat_log.txt''; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path $logPath) | Out-Null; $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); Add-Content -Path $logPath -Value (''[{0}] UserPromptSubmit {1}'' -f (Get-Date -Format o), $payload)'

preToolUse.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$logPath = ''C:\Users\Home\Projects\API-tester\.github\hooks\copilot_chat_log.txt''; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path $logPath) | Out-Null; $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); Add-Content -Path $logPath -Value (''[{0}] preToolUse {1}'' -f (Get-Date -Format o), $payload)'
